channel.title: SPL - High Point Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - High Point Branch

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities. 

Event details

item.title: Garden Hotline Presents: Growing Plants from Seed
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Learn how to start and grow plants from seed with expert help from the Garden Hotline!

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Monday, March 9, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Where Does It Go? Practical tips for reducing waste in Seattle
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Lobby

Join us to learn how to reduce waste and save money.

Event details

item.description:

Thursday, March 12, 2026 at 2 PM

item.title: Youth Drop-in Chess
item.description:
Thursday, March 12, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Youth Drop-in Chess for Children and Teens under 18 years of age. Come learn, practice and improve your chess playing skills.

Event details

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Friday, March 13, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: High Point Branch, Meeting Room

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.مارس لغتك الإنجليزية.دینک نیرمت ار دوخ یسیلگنا.ئړک نیرمت يسیلګنا هلپخПрактикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details
